roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1203,4 PETITION FOR DISM FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: DEFENSE PC 1203,4 PETITION/NP/CONTD: SAME, AND FOR APD SUPPLEMENTALREPORT/08    ASUPP RPT ON APD MTR/SUPP:04-08-19/S18/CTORD:APD TO FORWARDREPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT SHALL INCLUDE INFORMATION REGARDING TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION IN TULARE COUNTY,DEFENDANT'S COMPLIANCE WHILE ONPROBATION IN TULARE AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTIES, RESTITUTION ORDERED PAID AND STILL OWING BY DEFENDANT, AND PROBATION'SRECOMMENDATION RE DEFENDANT'S REQUESTED RELIEF/

/CAL: DEFENSE PC 1203,4 PETITION/NP/CONTD: SAME, AND RECEIPT OF APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/SUPP:02-04-19/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT SHALL INCLUDE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION IN TULARE COUNTY, COMPLIANCE WHILE ON PROBATION IN BOTH TULARE ANDSAN FRANCISCO COUNTIES, RESTITUTION ORDERED AND PAID, AND APD RECOMMENDATION RE DEFENSE REQUESTED RELIEF/
/CAL:APD 1203,9 TRANSFER FROM TULARE COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM TULARE COUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/PROB EXP:07-15-18/
